name: Riot Platforms, Inc.
sandbox_note: Template URL format riot-announces-{month}-{year}-production-and-operations-updates only works from 2023+. 2021 slugs have no year; 2022 used riot-blockchain prefix and/or numeric-ID deep paths. Pre-2023 production data covered by EDGAR 8-K filings. rss_url is BusinessWire company feed (informational; scraper_mode=template takes precedence).

name: CleanSpark, Inc.
sandbox_note: investors.cleanspark.com must be added to settings.json networkAllowList. Template format CleanSpark-Releases-{Month}-{year}-Bitcoin-Mining-Update only works from 2023+. 2022 slugs used different verb (Announces), different title (Bitcoin Production), and date suffix. 2021 used completely different PR formats. Pre-2023 production data covered by EDGAR 8-K filings. Mining started December 2020 (ATL Data Centers acquisition). rss_url is GlobeNewswire company feed (informational; scraper_mode=template takes precedence).

name: Core Scientific, Inc.
skip_reason: IR page returns 502; EDGAR 8-K filings are primary source. Filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy December 2022, emerged January 2024 as same SEC entity.
sandbox_note: investors.corescientific.com returned 502 as of 2026-03. Verify CIK 0001836012 against EDGAR (XPDI SPAC entity that merged with Core Scientific Holdings).

name: Cipher Mining Inc.
skip_reason: EDGAR 8-K filings are primary source. Mining operations began mid-2021.

name: TeraWulf Inc.
sandbox_note: investors.terawulf.com must be added to settings.json networkAllowList. TeraWulf began mining operations at Lake Mariner facility December 2021; first full-month production PRs begin early 2022. GlobeNewswire also publishes their releases.

name: Hut 8 Corp.
skip_reason: EDGAR 10-K/10-Q filings are primary source. Monthly production PRs available via PRNewswire (https://www.prnewswire.com/news/hut-8-corp./) but no RSS feed confirmed.
sandbox_note: Hut 8 Corp is the US-incorporated entity formed from the November 2023 merger of Hut 8 Mining Corp (Canada) and US Bitcoin Corp (USBTC). Ticker changed from HUT8 to HUT at that time. CIK 0001900035 is the new domestic filer; verify against EDGAR. Old HUT8 Canadian entity had no US SEC filings.

name: Stronghold Digital Mining, Inc.
skip_reason: Quarterly reporter; EDGAR 8-K filings are primary source. Reports mining metrics in quarterly earnings rather than monthly production updates.

name: Applied Digital Corporation
skip_reason: Quarterly reporter; EDGAR 10-Q/10-K filings are primary source. HPC data center business alongside mining; fiscal year ends May 31.
sandbox_note: Formerly Catapult Solutions Group (APLD ticker adopted post-rebrand). Applied Digital entered BTC mining via hosting/HPC services; direct BTC mining metrics may be limited.

name: American Bitcoin Corp.
skip_reason: New company formed 2025; EDGAR filing history minimal. CIK unknown; set to null until first SEC filing confirmed.
sandbox_note: American Bitcoin Corp was formed in early 2025 as a partnership between Hut 8 Corp and Eric/Donald Trump Jr. Mining operations based on Hut 8 US infrastructure. Verify SEC CIK once first 8-K or S-1 is filed. No production PR history pre-2025.

name: IREN Limited
skip_reason: IR page returns 502 as of 2026-03; EDGAR 6-K/20-F filings are primary source.
sandbox_note: Formerly Iris Energy Limited (rebranded to IREN in 2024). Australian company listed on Nasdaq as foreign private issuer. Fiscal year ends June 30. Files 20-F (annual) and 6-K (current reports) with SEC.

name: Bit Digital, Inc.
skip_reason: Foreign private issuer; EDGAR 6-K/20-F filings are primary source.
sandbox_note: Cayman Islands holding company, operations primarily in North America and Iceland. Monthly BTC production updates filed as 6-K with SEC. Formerly ZW Data Action Technologies; pivoted to BTC mining 2020.

name: Bitdeer Technologies Group
skip_reason: Foreign private issuer; EDGAR 6-K/20-F filings are primary source. GlobeNewswire RSS stored for reference.
sandbox_note: Cayman Islands holding company; Singapore-headquartered Bitcoin mining and hosting company. Files 20-F (annual) and 6-K (current) with SEC. GlobeNewswire RSS slug may need verification.

name: Argo Blockchain plc
skip_reason: IR page returns 502 as of 2026-03; EDGAR 6-K/20-F filings are primary source.
sandbox_note: UK-incorporated company listed on Nasdaq and London Stock Exchange. Files 20-F (annual) and 6-K (monthly production reports) with SEC. Sold Helios Texas facility to Galaxy Digital in 2023; now operates primarily in Quebec.

name: BitFuFu Inc.
skip_reason: Foreign private issuer; EDGAR 6-K/20-F filings are primary source. GlobeNewswire search URL stored for reference.
sandbox_note: Cayman Islands holding company; Singapore-based BTC mining and cloud mining services company. Listed on Nasdaq via SPAC (Arisz Acquisition Corp) in 2024. Bitmain affiliate. rss_url is a GlobeNewswire keyword search URL (not a company RSS feed).

name: Cango Inc.
skip_reason: Foreign private issuer; EDGAR 6-K/20-F filings are primary source. Pivoted to BTC mining in late 2024.
sandbox_note: Cayman Islands holding company; formerly a Chinese auto financing platform. Sold auto financing business and pivoted to BTC self-mining in late 2024. Limited mining history; BTC production data begins approximately Q4 2024.

name: Bitfarms Ltd.
skip_reason: Canadian company filing 40-F/6-K via EDGAR; press releases via GlobeNewswire. GlobeNewswire RSS stored for reference.
sandbox_note: Incorporated in British Columbia, Canada; dual-listed on Nasdaq and TSX. Files 40-F (annual) and 6-K (current reports) with SEC. Operates farms in Canada, USA, Paraguay, and Argentina. Monthly production updates published via GlobeNewswire. GlobeNewswire RSS slug may need verification.

name: HIVE Digital Technologies Ltd.
skip_reason: Canadian company filing 40-F/6-K via EDGAR; monthly GPU and BTC production updates in 6-K filings.
sandbox_note: Incorporated in British Columbia, Canada; dual-listed on Nasdaq and TSX. Fiscal year ends March 31. Files 40-F (annual) and 6-K (current reports) with SEC. Mines both BTC and ETH (GPU farms in Iceland, Sweden, Canada). Formerly HIVE Blockchain Technologies; rebranded to HIVE Digital in 2023.
